title: Kilner 0.5 Litre Glass Juice & Sauce Bottle Reusable BPA-Free Storage for Homemade Juices, Sauces and Yogurt
features: JUICE and SAUCE BOTTLE: The Kilner 0.5 litre or 500ml juice and sauce bottle is a versatile solution for storing and preserving all your homemade passata sauces, yogurts, freshly squeezed fruit juices, and flavoured milk. Made to fit inside a fridge door and designed with a wide neck and mouth for easy pouring and refilling. With a one-piece lid and a round lid label to add use-by dates and notes, this bottle will ensure your contents stay fresher for longer
CAPACITY: With a 0.5 Litre or 500 ml size, the juice and sauce bottle is ideal for storing and preserving all of your homemade fruits and vegetables juices and sauces. Dimensions: 15H x 8W x 8L cm

DURABILITY: The bottle is made from high-quality sodalime glass with pristine clarity and consistent wall thickness ensuring no weak points. Do not pour boiling water directly into the bottle. Wash before first use

SUSTAINABLE GLASS: Kilner glass is made from natural ingredients so no harmful chemicals or toxins can leak into the food, glass is BPA-free and does not absorb odours, flavours or stains, not only is glass a healthier option, but it is also made to last and never for single use. Kilner continues to tackle plastic waste with our ethos of REUSE, REFILL, RECYCLE

THE KILNER STORY: The original Kilner Jar, invented by John Kilner and Co. in England is as much loved and successful now as it was over 180 years ago. Our diverse product range provides simple solutions for preserving, food preparation, storage and eating on-the-go using high quality materials all authenticated with the iconic Kilner brand logo
